prompt: Watercolour bust-portrait of Munshi Premchand (Hindi writer), early-20th-century North India, simple kurta and round spectacles, a thoughtful expression, warm lamplight on a dark neutral ground. Loose luminous washes, soft bleeding edges, pigment granulation, visible paper grain. No text.

Dark atmospheric ground, warm rim light. Loose luminous washes, visible paper grain. No text.
alt: हीरा और मोती — झूरी के दो बैल
